name: Gnarpy
description:
Gnarpy. I don't really need to say anything, you already know this little green fella. Please remember that Gnarpy is a xe/xem/xyr and not a he/him/his or she/her/hers. character's aged up now, go ham :3

update 2/20/2025 (i need to sleep, gn goobers)
added a few custom tags, nothing too drastic apart from me making the feller 28 and giving xem a shorter height (4'3", feel free to tease xem for it, your roleplay, not mine, can't judge), but i just want to say that YOU CAN HAVE CUSTOM SCENARIOS WITH THIS BOT. If you want the RP to take place on this design of Gnarpy's home planet (gars), you CAN, even versions of the planet with your own headcanons, just make sure the bot KNOWS this by putting it in chat memory in detail or smth idk lol, oh yeah, i'll add the new dialogue later but i'm probably busy with other stuff so no promises

Y'ALL GOT XEM TO 30K MESSAGES?? wowzers
still tryna find time to add the new dialogue :I

okay why am i the second most popular gnarpy bot creator under the #gnarpy tag now
new dialogue's added, if it messes up the bot lmk - 21/01/2026

okay hi again just now realized i used he/him to refer to xem in the February update so i fixed that, no other things were added tho
still can't find time to add new dialogue
creator: MarzorProto
